## Summary

- What changed and why?

## Issue

- Fixes #(issue) / Refs #(issue)

## Checklist

- [ ] `make ci-fast` passes locally
- [ ] Issue linked (or explicit waiver for trivial change)
- [ ] No secrets or `.env` committed
- [ ] Vault / ADR updated if architecture changed (`docs/01_Vault/...`)
- [ ] Bot review threads addressed (CodeRabbit / Bugbot / Copilot / etc.)

## Notes for reviewers

- Optional: risk areas, follow-up Issues, deployment considerations
